content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.health.harvard.edu/healthy-aging-and-longevity/4-intermittent-fasting-side-effects-to-watch-out-for", "source_title": "4 intermittent fasting side effects to watch out for", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "The idea is that it's easier to sharply restrict calories a few days a week or to limit eating to a shortened \"eating window\" each day than ...", "direct_quote": "The idea is that it's easier to sharply restrict calories a few days a week or to limit eating to a shortened \"eating window\" each day than it is to moderately cut calories at every meal, every day.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "To decrease some of these unwanted side effects, you may want to switch from adf fasting to periodic fasting or a time restricted eating pla...", "direct_quote": "To decrease some of these unwanted side effects, you may want to switch from adf fasting to periodic fasting or a time restricted eating plan that allows you to eat everyday within a certain time period. #2.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "It's human nature for people to want to reward themselves after doing very hard work, such as exercise or fasting for a long period of time,...", "direct_quote": "It's human nature for people to want to reward themselves after doing very hard work, such as exercise or fasting for a long period of time, so there is a danger of indulging in unhealthy dietary habits on non-fasting days.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
